query:
-- Check remaining empty authorNames
SELECT bookTitle, authorName, coverImageUrl FROM book_profiles 
WHERE authorName IS NULL OR authorName = ''
ORDER BY bookTitle;

-- Check bad title entries (title = author name, or placeholder titles)
SELECT bookTitle, authorName, coverImageUrl FROM book_profiles 
WHERE bookTitle IN ('Book PDF', 'Jefferson-Fisher-Open-Graph', 'Charles Duhigg', 'David Brooks', 'No')
   OR bookTitle LIKE '%Open-Graph%'
ORDER BY bookTitle;
